metadata.title: 貴きみかみよ
metadata.subtitle: Aus tiefer Not (Luther) — Japanese (讃美歌, 1931), tr. Nakayama Masaki
metadata.lyricist: Martin Luther (1483–1546), "Aus tiefer Not schrei ich zu dir" (1523) — Japanese translation by Nakayama Masaki 中山昌樹 (1886–1944)
metadata.x_pd_basis: Luther's original German lyrics and tune (1523) are PD by > 470 years. Japanese translation by Nakayama Masaki (d. 1944) — > 70 years post-mortem, PD per Japanese copyright law. First published in 讃美歌 (1931) no. 250. Japanese Wikisource explicitly marks the translation as PD-old-50-1996
